mapper.select: SELECT *, CONCAT(sys01_zip_addr, ' ' || sys01_zip_detail) AS sys01_full_address FROM sys01_company ORDER BY sys01_company_nm

SELECT *, CONCAT(sys01_zip_addr, ' ' || sys01_zip_detail) AS sys01_full_address FROM sys01_company WHERE UPPER(CONCAT(sys01_company_nm, sys01_loc_nm, sys01_note)) LIKE UPPER(#{companyName}) AND ( (#{useYn} = 'true' AND COALESCE(sys01_use_yn, 'true') = 'true') OR (#{useYn} = 'false') ) ORDER BY sys01_company_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys01_company (sys01_company_nm, sys01_loc_nm, sys01_biz_no, sys01_use_yn, sys01_note, sys01_office_tel_no, sys01_mobile_tel_no, sys01_email_addr, sys01_company_rep_nm) VALUES (#{companyName}, #{locationName}, #{bizNo}, #{useYn}, #{note}, #{officeTelNo}, #{mobileTelNo}, #{emailAddress}, #{companyRepName})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys01_company SET sys01_company_nm = #{companyName}, sys01_loc_nm = #{locationName}, sys01_biz_no = #{bizNo}, sys01_use_yn = #{useYn}, sys01_note = #{note}, sys01_office_tel_no = #{officeTelNo}, sys01_mobile_tel_no = #{mobileTelNo}, sys01_email_addr = #{emailAddress}, sys01_company_rep_nm = #{companyRepName} WHERE sys01_company_id = #{companyId}
